title: Nak Loves Mak Sooo Much!
original_title: นากรักมาก ม๊ากมาก
overview: Two best friends, Peued and Uncle, set out to remake the timeless love legend of Mae Nak Phra Khanong, but things quickly spiral out of control when the real Mae Nak shows up to play herself. On a mission to find her true love, now reincarnated as Krist, a rising young actor.
